title: Robin Hood Wins the Sheriff's Golden Arrow
titleZh: 罗宾汉赢得警长的金箭

q.en: Why did the Sheriff of Nottingham hold the archery festival?
q.zh: 诺丁汉郡长为什么要举办射箭节？

options.en: To trap and catch Robin Hood

explain.en: The Sheriff planned the festival with a gold arrow prize, sure it would draw Robin Hood so he could arrest and hang him.
explain.zh: 郡长以金箭为奖举办射箭节，料想能把罗宾汉引出来，好逮捕并绞死他。

q.en: How does Robin Hood disguise himself at the festival?
q.zh: 罗宾汉在射箭节上如何伪装自己？

options.en: As a rich lord in purple velvet
options.zh: 伪装成穿紫色天鹅绒的富豪

options.en: As a beggar with walnut-stained hair and an eye patch
options.zh: 伪装成用胡桃染色头发、戴眼罩的乞丐

options.en: He does not disguise himself at all

explain.en: Robin darkens his yellow hair with walnut stain and covers one eye with a patch, dressed in a beggar's rags.
explain.zh: 罗宾用胡桃汁把黄发染暗，用眼罩遮住一只眼，穿得像个乞丐。

q.en: How far away were the archery targets set up?
q.zh: 射箭靶设在与射手多远的地方？

explain.en: The targets were set up eighty yards away from where the archers stood.
explain.zh: 靶子设在距射手80码远的地方。

q.en: Where does Robin Hood's arrow land in the final round?
q.zh: 在最后一轮，罗宾汉的箭射在了哪里？

options.en: Into the very center of the target

explain.en: The beggar (Robin) shot his arrow into the very center, and the crowd gasped then cheered.
explain.zh: 那个乞丐（罗宾）把箭射入正中心，人群先惊呼后欢呼。

q.en: What is the prize in the contest?

explain.en: The Sheriff creates a prize: a gold-covered arrow, meant to lure Robin Hood.
explain.zh: 郡长设下的奖品是一支镀金的箭，用来引诱罗宾汉。

q.en: Why does Robin Hood send the arrow back through the Sheriff's window?
q.zh: 罗宾汉为什么把箭从郡长的窗户射回去？

options.en: To prove he was the beggar who won and was no coward
options.zh: 为了证明那个赢家就是他，且他不是懦夫

explain.en: Robin is bothered the Sheriff called him a coward, so he sends the arrow with a note revealing he was the winner; his men scraped off the gold.
explain.zh: 罗宾不满郡长称他懦夫，于是射回箭并附字条表明赢家就是他；手下还刮下了金层。

q.en: What kind of character is Robin Hood in this tale?
q.zh: 在这个故事中，罗宾汉是个怎样的人物？

options.en: A cruel lord who overtaxes the poor
A hero who steals from the corrupt rich to help the poor
options.zh: 从腐败的富人那里偷钱、帮助穷人的英雄

options.en: A coward who hides in the forest

explain.en: To his enemies Robin is a feared robber, but to the common people he helps, he is a beloved hero.
explain.zh: 对敌人他是令人畏惧的盗贼，但对他帮助的百姓而言，他是受人爱戴的英雄。

options.en: A written order authorizing an arrest

explain.en: The glossary defines a warrant as a written order authorizing an arrest or a search.
explain.zh: 词汇表把 warrant 定义为授权逮捕或搜查的书面命令。

q.en: What do Robin Hood's men do with the gold on the arrow?
q.zh: 罗宾汉的手下如何处理箭上的金层？

options.en: They return it to the Sheriff.
They scrape it off and keep it.
They melt it into a statue.
options.zh: 他们把它熔成一尊雕像。

options.en: They give it to the king.

explain.en: The note reveals Robin's men scraped off the gold and kept it after winning the prize.
explain.zh: 字条显示，罗宾的手下在赢得奖品后刮下金层并留了下来。

q.en: Why does the story portray the Sheriff of Nottingham negatively?
q.zh: 故事为什么把诺丁汉郡长描写成负面形象？

options.en: To make him the funny character
options.zh: 为了让他成为搞笑角色

options.en: To contrast him with Robin as a corrupt, hateful figure
options.zh: 为了把他与罗宾对比，塑造成腐败可恨的形象

explain.en: The Sheriff is shown as vengeful and corrupt, which makes Robin Hood's trickery and heroism stand out.
explain.zh: 郡长被刻画成记仇而腐败，这更凸显了罗宾汉的智谋与英雄形象。

prompt.en: If you were Robin Hood, how would you have revealed yourself to the Sheriff after winning? Do you think tricking the Sheriff was fair? Explain your view.
prompt.zh: 如果你是罗宾汉，赢得比赛后会如何向郡长表明身份？你认为捉弄郡长公平吗？请说明你的看法。

en: Think about whether the ends justify the tricks.
Consider how the common people saw Robin.
zh: 想想目的是否能证明手段正当。
考虑百姓是如何看待罗宾的。
